# Barnhart Crane & Rigging

Barnhart Crane & Rigging provides heavy-lift, rigging, and specialized transport support for modular infrastructure, electrical assemblies, and large site equipment.

## Why it matters
- Adds set, placement, and craning realism to modular and packaged-power deployments.
- Strengthens the last-mile physical execution layer that many infrastructure graphs ignore.
- Makes E-house and large electrical package delivery more believable.

## Best fit
- Projects involving oversized electrical assemblies or modular enclosures.
- Fast-track deployments where placement sequencing matters.
- Programs combining transport, rigging, and field installation.

## Operational role in the graph
- Deepens `infrastructure-logistics`.
- Supports believable handoff from fabricated systems into field installation.
- Reinforces the path from packaged power and modular substations into actual site placement.
